title: SuperHeroes: Heroes!
description: A modpack about superheroes, fantasy and powerups!
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7655e8189d0b7d2c836236dd1bb1c759406f62e5.png)

This modpack brings a variety of superhero-themed content into the game, allowing players to explore new abilities, suits, and challenges inspired by well-known heroes and original concepts. 

It focuses on progression, letting players unlock powers, craft equipment, and face stronger enemies over time. 

Designed to work well in both singleplayer and multiplayer, offering a mix of action, exploration, and customization while keeping gameplay accessible and stable.
